window-size-classes.summary: Choose shell structure and navigation adaptation from compact, medium, and expanded widths.

window_class_guidance.compact: Single-pane task focus, bottom navigation when top-level destinations are persistent.
window_class_guidance.medium: Navigation rail by default, optional supporting pane for dense content.
window_class_guidance.expanded: Permanent drawer or multi-pane shell when information density warrants it.

platform_notes.compose: Compose adaptive layouts are the primary reference.
platform_notes.flutter: Translate width-class intent into breakpoints and scaffold adaptation.
platform_notes.web: Use as responsive shell guidance, not as proof of runtime parity.

adaptive-navigation.summary: Adapt primary navigation from bar to rail to drawer as width and IA complexity increase.

platform_notes.compose: Canonical rule for MD3 navigation adaptation.
platform_notes.flutter: Supported with scaffold composition and breakpoint logic.
platform_notes.web: Use as shell guidance only when the app intentionally follows MD3.

edge-to-edge.summary: Treat system bars, safe areas, and IME insets as first-class layout inputs.

window_class_guidance.compact: Protect bottom bars, FABs, and sheets from gesture and IME collisions.
window_class_guidance.medium: Preserve rail and pane spacing while respecting status and navigation insets.
window_class_guidance.expanded: Keep drawer, pane, and top-bar regions aligned under safe drawing rules.

platform_notes.compose: Prefer WindowInsets-aware APIs over magic numbers.
platform_notes.flutter: Use SafeArea and explicit inset handling together, not blindly.

responsive-app-shells.summary: Start from an MD3 shell before styling the screen interior.

window_class_guidance.compact: Top app bar + primary content + optional bottom nav/FAB
window_class_guidance.medium: Top app bar + rail + content + optional supporting pane
window_class_guidance.expanded: Top app bar + permanent drawer or rail + multi-pane content

platform_notes.compose: Use Scaffold-style composition with adaptive nav.
platform_notes.flutter: Use themed scaffold structures with explicit breakpoint adaptation.
platform_notes.web: Treat shells as a tokenized layout framework, not as generic dashboard templates.

large-screens.summary: Use additional panes only when they reduce context switching.

window_class_guidance.medium: Support list-detail patterns where content density benefits.
window_class_guidance.expanded: Promote to permanent navigation and supporting panes where justified.

platform_notes.compose: Canonical large-screen and adaptive UI path.
platform_notes.flutter: Mirror intent even when APIs differ.

foldables.summary: Separate posture logic from width logic when fold state materially affects layout.

window_class_guidance.medium: Consider pane separation when posture offers meaningful split context.
window_class_guidance.expanded: Keep posture-aware panes task-driven rather than novelty-driven.

platform_notes.compose: Primary path for posture-aware adaptive behavior.
platform_notes.flutter: Support conditionally if the app consumes fold/posture data.
platform_notes.web: Guidance-only unless foldable web support is explicitly proven.
